title: Unified Ruurian Colonies
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Unified Ruurian Colonies''' were a group of [[Planet/Legends|planets]] in the [[Tingel Arm/Legends|Tingel Arm]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] controlled by the [[Ruurian/Legends|Ruurian]] [[Species/Legends|species]] from [[Ruuria/Legends|Ruuria]].

==History==
In [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]], the region was headed by [[Amisus]], who surrendered it to the [[Imperial Remnant]], which was being represented by an [[Flim (Human)|imposter]] of [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] during the [[Caamas Document Crisis]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Vision of the Future]]'' {{Ab|Vision of the Future (unabridged audiobook)}}
